originalTitle: Three years of messages at once - a chronicle of Sudan's war pours in as trapped reporter's phone turns on
title: Three years of messages at once - a chronicle of Sudan's war pours in as trapped reporter's phone turns on
content: As the conflict enters its fourth year, journalist Mohamed Suleiman shudders at what has been lost.

originalTitle: Partner of US influencer who died in Zanzibar speaking to police as witness
title: Partner of US influencer who died in Zanzibar speaking to police as witness
content: The police said Ashly Robinson, known online as Ashlee Jenae, had died after attempting to take her own life.

originalTitle: Cameroon separatists to pause fighting ahead of Pope visit
title: Cameroon separatists to pause fighting ahead of Pope visit
content: The separatists say their decison reflects responsibility, restraint and respect for human dignity.

originalTitle: South Africa appoints former apartheid-era negotiator as US ambassador
title: South Africa appoints former apartheid-era negotiator as US ambassador
content: Roelf Meyer will replace the South African ambassador who was expelled from the US by President Donald Trump in 2025.

originalTitle: New trial begins over football legend Maradona’s death
title: New trial begins over football legend Maradona’s death
content: A new trial has begun in Argentina over the death of football legend Diego Maradona.

originalTitle: US forces kill 4 people in latest strike on vessels in eastern Pacific
title: US forces kill 4 people in latest strike on vessels in eastern Pacific
content: The killings mark the fourth US deadly strike in the past four days on vessels in the eastern Pacific Ocean.

originalTitle: 'Bit of pain' worth long-term security from Iran, Bessent tells BBC
title: 'Bit of pain' worth long-term security from Iran, Bessent tells BBC
content: US Treasury Secretary said a "small bit of economic pain" was worth it to eliminate the threat of Iranian strikes on Western capitals.

originalTitle: Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993
title: Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993
content: A US statement said the two sides had agreed to launch direct negotiations, at a time and place to be determined.

title: Slot's Isak gamble backfires as Liverpool trophy hopes end
content: Arne Slot's gamble to start Alexander Isak against PSG backfires with his own future also in the balance after a Champions League exit.

title: Success over Spain - but how can England get best out of classy James?
content: How can Sarina Wiegman get the best from one of England's most talented footballers, Lauren James?

originalTitle: Slot fears Ekitike injury is 'really bad'
title: Slot fears Ekitike injury is 'really bad'
content: Liverpool boss Arne Slot says Hugo Ekitike's injury 'looks really bad' after the France striker was taken off on a stretcher during Tuesday's Champions League loss to Paris St-Germain.
